cards.title: The Dark Jester
cards.subtitle: Card of Memory
cards.intro: You think you can remember, little prisoner? Your mind is already unravelling in my carnival. Let us see how much of it remains...
cards.successQuote: Impressive. A mind sharper than most. But the carnival is far from finished with you.
cards.failQuote: Ha. Already forgotten? The curse feeds on your confusion. Try again... if you dare.
cards.resetQuote: Three times. Three failures. The Jester laughs as your memory crumbles to dust.

cards.title: The Skull Card
cards.subtitle: Card of Secrets
cards.intro: Every lock has a secret. Every secret has a price. Solve my riddle and I may — just may — let this one go.
cards.successQuote: You cracked it. A clever little prisoner indeed. The skull is not finished with you yet.
cards.failQuote: Wrong. The skull keeps its secrets well. Try again — the answer is closer than you think.
cards.resetQuote: Three wrong answers. The skull has swallowed the secret whole. Start again from nothing.

riddles.riddle: I have four legs in the morning, two at noon, and three in the evening. What am I?
The more you take, the more you leave behind. Count my shadows — there are as many as steps in a staircase of seven.
I speak without a mouth. I hear without ears. I have no body but come alive with the wind. My number hides in the letters of my name.
riddles.hint: No hint. The Joker offers none.

cards.title: The Blood Diamond
cards.subtitle: Card of Reflection
cards.intro: Symmetry. Such a fragile, human obsession. Mirror my madness perfectly — or the diamond drinks your failure.
cards.successQuote: A perfect reflection. For a moment you almost matched my precision. Almost.
cards.failQuote: Imperfect. The diamond does not forgive imperfection. Look closer.
cards.resetQuote: Three broken reflections. The diamond has lost its patience. Begin again.

cards.title: The Shadow Spade
cards.subtitle: Card of Words
cards.intro: Words hold power in my carnival. Rearrange the chaos I have made of language — if your feeble mind can still read.
cards.successQuote: You found the word hiding in the shadow. A linguist as well as a thinker. How tiresome.
cards.failQuote: Still scrambled. The spade buries your attempts deeper. Try again.
cards.resetQuote: Three failures. The shadow has swallowed the word whole. The letters scatter once more.

tapAnswer.clue: A trick played by the court fool
The fearless act the Joker mocks
The mark left by the Joker's blade

cards.title: The Cursed Crown
cards.subtitle: Card of Perception
cards.intro: Everything in my carnival belongs — except one. One thing is always wrong. One thing is always out of place. Can you see it?
cards.successQuote: Sharp eyes. You spotted the imposter. The crown is displeased but cannot deny your perception.
cards.failQuote: Blind. The odd one laughs at you from within the crowd. Look again.
cards.resetQuote: Three times you saw what was not there. The crown has clouded your vision completely. Start fresh.

cards.title: The Demon Club
cards.subtitle: Card of Order
cards.intro: Order. Sequence. Pattern. The demon demands you follow precisely. One mistake and the sequence resets. Can you keep up?
cards.successQuote: You followed the demon's pattern. Not many do. The club acknowledges your discipline.
cards.failQuote: Wrong colour. The demon resets. Pay closer attention this time.
cards.resetQuote: Three full resets. The demon has no more patience for you. The sequence scatters. Begin again.

cards.title: The Joker's Eye
cards.subtitle: The Final Curse
cards.intro: So. You broke six of my curses. Impressive — and deeply annoying. But the Eye sees all. It holds fragments of every curse combined. Break this last seal... and you are free. Fail... and you belong to me.
cards.successQuote: Free. You are free. Leave my carnival. But know this — the Joker never forgets a face.
cards.failQuote: So close. The Eye blinks. Try again — all three steps await.
cards.resetQuote: Three attempts. Three failures on the final curse. The Eye weeps with laughter. From the very beginning.
